Home / Services / Electrical Panel Upgrades

Electrical Panel Upgrades

Ensure your home's electrical system is safe and up-to-date with a panel upgrade.

Winters Electric provides expert electrical panel upgrades for homes and businesses in Boise, ID. An outdated or overloaded electrical panel can be a safety hazard, increasing the risk of fire and electrical shock. If your panel is tripping frequently, showing signs of corrosion, or unable to handle your modern electrical demands, it's time for an upgrade. We understand the importance of a reliable electrical panel, especially with Boise's growing reliance on technology.

Our panel upgrade services include replacing old or damaged panels, increasing amperage capacity, and installing surge protection devices. We'll assess your electrical needs and recommend the appropriate panel upgrade to ensure that your system can safely and efficiently handle all of your electrical loads. We use only high-quality panels from trusted manufacturers and adhere to all local codes and regulations.

With Winters Electric, you can rest assured that your panel upgrade will be done safely and professionally. We'll handle all aspects of the project, from obtaining permits to disposing of the old panel. Protect your property and your family – contact Winters Electric today for a free panel upgrade consultation.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Schedule a panel upgrade consultation.
  2. 02 Step 2: We assess your electrical needs and provide a recommendation.
  3. 03 Step 3: We obtain the necessary permits.
  4. 04 Step 4: Our electricians perform the panel upgrade safely and efficiently.

Benefits

  • Improved safety
  • Increased capacity
  • Surge protection
  • Code compliance

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I know if I need an electrical panel upgrade?

Common signs include frequent tripping breakers, flickering lights, and an outdated panel.

What size panel do I need?

The size of the panel depends on your electrical needs. We'll assess your needs and recommend the appropriate size during the consultation.

How long does a panel upgrade take?

A typical panel upgrade takes one to two days to complete.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with electrical panel upgrades? Contact us today.
